home-loads.name: Home page loads
home-loads.description: Home page renders with hero, featured animals, and shelter spotlight

home-to-animals.name: Navigate from home to animals
home-to-animals.description: User clicks explore animals CTA on home page and navigates to /animales

home-to-shelters.name: Navigate from home to shelters
home-to-shelters.description: User clicks shelter spotlight and navigates to /refugios

home-to-campaigns.name: Navigate from home to campaigns
home-to-campaigns.description: User clicks active campaigns section and navigates to /campanas

auth-sign-in-form.name: Sign-in form display and interaction
auth-sign-in-form.description: User navigates to /sign-in, sees form fields and can type in them

auth-login-invalid.name: Login with invalid credentials
auth-login-invalid.description: User submits invalid credentials and stays on sign-in page with error

auth-sign-up-form.name: Sign-up form display and validation
auth-sign-up-form.description: User navigates to /sign-up and sees registration form with client-side validation

auth-forgot-password-form.name: Forgot password form display
auth-forgot-password-form.description: User navigates to /forgot-password and sees email input and send code button

auth-protected-redirect.name: Protected route redirect
auth-protected-redirect.description: Unauthenticated user accessing protected routes is redirected to /sign-in

auth-role-redirect.name: Role-based navigation
auth-role-redirect.description: Authenticated user sees role-specific navigation links in header

animal-browse.name: Browse animals listing
animal-browse.description: User visits /animales and sees animal cards grid

animal-filter.name: Filter animals by species/size/age
animal-filter.description: User applies species/size/age filters and sees filtered results

animal-detail.name: View animal detail
animal-detail.description: User clicks an animal card and views detail page with info and gallery

animal-gallery.name: Animal gallery interaction
animal-gallery.description: Animal detail page displays gallery images

shelter-browse.name: Browse shelters listing
shelter-browse.description: User visits /refugios and sees shelter cards

shelter-detail.name: View shelter profile
shelter-detail.description: User clicks a shelter card and views profile with animals and campaigns

shelter-onboarding.name: Shelter registration form
shelter-onboarding.description: User fills out shelter registration form at /refugio/onboarding

adoption-submit.name: Submit adoption application
adoption-submit.description: User submits adoption application from animal detail page

adoption-track.name: Track adoption applications
adoption-track.description: User views their adoption applications at /mis-solicitudes with status badges

adoption-manage.name: Manage adoption applications (shelter)
adoption-manage.description: Shelter admin reviews and updates application status at /refugio/solicitudes

campaign-browse.name: Browse campaigns
campaign-browse.description: User visits /campanas and sees campaign cards with progress bars

campaign-detail.name: View campaign detail
campaign-detail.description: User clicks campaign card and views detail with progress and donation CTA

donation-checkout.name: Donation checkout flow
donation-checkout.description: User selects amount, payment method, and submits donation at /checkout/donacion

sponsorship-checkout.name: Sponsorship checkout flow
sponsorship-checkout.description: User selects amount, frequency, payment method at /checkout/apadrinamiento

favorite-toggle.name: Toggle animal favorite
favorite-toggle.description: User favorites/unfavorites an animal and sees it in /favoritos

favorite-list.name: View favorites list
favorite-list.description: User views their favorited animals at /favoritos

adopter-intent-create.name: Create adopter intent
adopter-intent-create.description: User creates or updates their adoption intent at /mi-intencion

adopter-intent-browse.name: Browse adopter intents
adopter-intent-browse.description: User views public adopter intents at /busco-adoptar

shelter-panel-dashboard.name: Shelter dashboard
shelter-panel-dashboard.description: Shelter admin views dashboard with navigation to management sections

shelter-panel-animals.name: Shelter manage animals
shelter-panel-animals.description: Shelter admin views and filters their animals at /refugio/animales

shelter-panel-campaigns.name: Shelter manage campaigns
shelter-panel-campaigns.description: Shelter admin views campaigns with progress at /refugio/campanas

shelter-panel-donations.name: Shelter view donations
shelter-panel-donations.description: Shelter admin views received donations at /refugio/donaciones

shelter-panel-settings.name: Shelter settings
shelter-panel-settings.description: Shelter admin updates shelter info at /refugio/configuracion

admin-approve-shelters.name: Admin approve/reject shelters
admin-approve-shelters.description: Admin approves or rejects pending shelters at /admin/refugios/aprobar

admin-metrics.name: Admin detailed metrics
admin-metrics.description: Admin views financial and adoption metrics at /admin/metricas

navigation-header.name: Header navigation
navigation-header.description: Header contains navigation links to Animales, Refugios, Campanas, Busco Adoptar

navigation-footer.name: Footer navigation
navigation-footer.description: Footer element is visible with explore, account, and info links

navigation-between-pages.name: Cross-page navigation
navigation-between-pages.description: User navigates across home, animales, refugios, campanas, and sign-in pages

payment-confirmation.name: Payment confirmation page
payment-confirmation.description: User sees confirmation page after donation/sponsorship checkout

auth-sign-out.name: Sign out
auth-sign-out.description: Authenticated user clicks sign out, tokens are cleared, redirected to /sign-in

auth-session-persistence.name: Session persistence and token refresh
auth-session-persistence.description: User with valid tokens accesses protected route; expired access token triggers refresh

auth-google-login.name: Google OAuth login
auth-google-login.description: User clicks Google sign-in button, completes OAuth, is authenticated and redirected

public-faq.name: FAQ page
public-faq.description: User navigates to /faq and sees frequently asked questions

adopter-profile.name: User profile management
adopter-profile.description: User views and updates their profile at /mi-perfil

admin-payments.name: Admin payment audit
admin-payments.description: Admin views payment audit table at /admin/pagos

blog-browse.name: Blog listing page
blog-browse.description: User browses blog listing at /blog with category filters and search

blog-detail.name: Blog post detail
blog-detail.description: User reads a full blog post at /blog/:slug with content, progress bar, sharing

blog-admin-list.name: Admin blog list
blog-admin-list.description: Admin views all blog posts (published, draft, scheduled) with actions

blog-admin-create.name: Admin blog create
blog-admin-create.description: Admin creates a new blog post via manual form or JSON import

blog-admin-edit.name: Admin blog edit
blog-admin-edit.description: Admin edits an existing blog post fields, JSON content, SEO, cover image

blog-admin-calendar.name: Admin blog calendar
blog-admin-calendar.description: Admin views blog calendar with monthly post overview and status colors

shelter-panel-applications.name: Shelter manage adoption applications
shelter-panel-applications.description: Shelter admin views received adoption applications and changes status (reviewing/interview/approved/rejected) at /refugio/solicitudes

adoption-form-wizard.name: Adoption form wizard completion
adoption-form-wizard.description: Authenticated adopter completes the 3-step adoption wizard (6-section questionnaire, review, submit) for a specific animal

donation-checkout-submit.name: Donation checkout form submission
donation-checkout-submit.description: Authenticated user selects preset amount, chooses payment method (card/PSE/Nequi), fills optional message, and submits donation form

sponsorship-checkout-submit.name: Sponsorship checkout form submission
sponsorship-checkout-submit.description: Authenticated user selects frequency (monthly/one-time), preset amount, payment method, and submits sponsorship form

notification-preferences.name: Notification preferences management
notification-preferences.description: User visits /my-profile/notifications and toggles email/in_app notification preferences per event group

notification-bell.name: Notification bell interaction
notification-bell.description: Authenticated user sees bell icon with unread count, opens dropdown, views notifications, and clicks mark all read

shelter-panel-updates.name: Shelter manage update posts
shelter-panel-updates.description: Shelter admin views and manages update posts at /refugio/updates

shelter-panel-update-create.name: Shelter create update post
shelter-panel-update-create.description: Shelter admin creates a new update post with content and images at /refugio/updates/create

shelter-detail-view-animals.name: Shelter detail view animals link
shelter-detail-view-animals.description: User clicks View Animals on shelter detail page and sees filtered animal list for that shelter

locale-switch.name: Locale switcher toggle
locale-switch.description: User toggles ES/EN locale switcher in header and page content re-renders in the target language

campaign-tab-toggle.name: Campaign tab toggle
campaign-tab-toggle.description: User toggles between Active and Completed tabs on campaigns listing and sees correct campaigns in each

campaign-donate-cta.name: Campaign donate CTA
campaign-donate-cta.description: User clicks Donate CTA on campaign detail page and is routed to donation checkout with campaign context

shelter-detail-gallery.name: Shelter detail gallery lightbox
shelter-detail-gallery.description: User opens lightbox gallery on shelter detail page and navigates images

home-featured-animals-carousel.name: Home featured animals carousel
home-featured-animals-carousel.description: User interacts with featured animals carousel on home page (next/prev navigation, click card)

home-active-campaigns-carousel.name: Home active campaigns carousel
home-active-campaigns-carousel.description: User interacts with active campaigns carousel on home page (next/prev navigation, click card)

public-about.name: About page
public-about.description: User visits /about and sees organization information

public-terms.name: Terms page
public-terms.description: User visits /terms and sees terms of service content

public-strategic-allies.name: Strategic allies page
public-strategic-allies.description: User visits /strategic-allies and sees partner organizations

my-applications-list.name: View my adoption applications
my-applications-list.description: Authenticated adopter views submitted applications at /my-applications with status badges and application details

volunteer-apply.name: Submit volunteer application
volunteer-apply.description: User fills out and submits volunteer application form at /work-with-us/apply/[positionId] with reCAPTCHA verification

profile-edit.name: Edit user profile
profile-edit.description: Authenticated user edits profile fields (name, phone, city, bio, avatar) at /my-profile/edit and saves changes

favorites-compare.name: Compare favorited animals
favorites-compare.description: Authenticated user selects 2+ favorited animals and views side-by-side attribute comparison

favorite-note-edit.name: Edit favorite animal note
favorite-note-edit.description: Authenticated user edits the personal note on a favorited animal at /favoritos via inline text input

blog-admin-delete.name: Admin delete blog post
blog-admin-delete.description: Admin deletes a blog post from the admin list with confirmation dialog

blog-admin-duplicate.name: Admin duplicate blog post
blog-admin-duplicate.description: Admin duplicates a blog post from the admin list, creating a new draft copy
